xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for finalizing PR #25 (meditation horn voices)

plan.title: Fog horn, ship's horn, and train horn meditation voices (finalize PR #25)

narratives.Overview: Finalize and land the in-flight PR #25, which adds three synthesized meditation voices — fog horn (#22), ship's horn, and train horn (#23) — built on a shared distantHorn synth helper (low fundamental, soft attack, lowpass filtering for distance, long 16-18 s decay), with the train horn adding minor-third tierce partials for a distinct timbre. The voices auto-wire into the Meditation panel registry and are disabled by default like other non-bell voices. This scope covers bringing the branch up to date with main (which has advanced significantly: chords section, sound-trigger glow, MeditationEngine.setOnFire, etc.), addressing all outstanding review/bot findings (P0/P1/P2), resolving merge conflicts so the horns integrate with the CURRENT meditation registry and engine, and getting required CI green so the PR can merge.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Fog horn, ship's horn, and train horn voices exist in the meditation voice registry and appear in the Meditation panel with correct labels, disabled by default. FR-2: Shared distantHorn synth helper produces a distant/deep tone with soft attack, lowpass distance filtering, and a long decay; train horn adds minor-third tierce partials. FR-3: The branch is merged up to date with main and integrates with the current registry/engine (including setOnFire/glow wiring) without regressions. FR-4: All P0/P1/P2 review or bot findings on PR #25 are resolved (fixed or justified). NFR-1: typecheck, lint, and the full vitest suite pass; new source files have co-located tests per the forward-coverage gate and src/lib meets the 85% coverage gate. NFR-2: Required CI check no-mixed-core-and-app passes and the PR is mergeable via merge-commit convention.

items.title: Bring feat/meditation-horns up to date with main and resolve conflicts against the current meditation registry/engine
Address all P0/P1/P2 review and bot findings on PR #25 (fix or justify)
Verify typecheck/lint/test/build clean with co-located tests and coverage gates satisfied
Get required CI green and land PR #25 via merge commit

references.title: PR #25: fog horn, ship's horn, and train horn meditation sounds
